quote: Z is an expert in Consumer Insights and leading technology-enabled change. She's also a brilliant coach, a wonderful human being and a joy to work with!
name: Tom Holliss
title: Chief People Officer

quote: What stood out most was her unwavering commitment to excellence and growth. Her relentless drive, combined with her out-of-the-box thinking, guaranteed that her ideas not only resonated with the teams but also left a lasting impact in pursuit of the ultimate goal – client happiness.
name: Radostina Pehlivanova
title: VoC Expert

quote: Z has a talent for teaching others, and she does so with gusto! It's clear that she loves learning, researching, and solving problems, and she inspires others with her can-do attitude.
name: Liz Mongrain
title: Strategist and Storyteller

quote: Z is one of those rare leaders who not only brings deep expertise in research but also knows how to build and uplift those around her. Her ability to take complex data and turn it into clear, actionable insights is incredible. But what really sets Zontziry apart is her leadership. She leads with empathy, always making sure people feel supported, valued, and empowered to do their best work. Whether she's mentoring, building research functions from the ground up, or collaborating across teams, she does it all with a mix of sharp strategy and genuine care.
name: Alexis White
title: Founder
